message:
sync beads: add query embedding flow and MRL renormalization tests

bd-3az0 (Two-Tier Search):
- Added section 2.4: Query Embedding Flow (CRITICAL)
  - Clarified that query embeddings happen at search time
  - Fast query via in-process Model2Vec (~1ms)
  - Quality query via daemon MiniLM (~10ms)
- Added section 2.5: Hybrid Search Integration
  - Defined HybridTwoTierMode options
  - Default: SemanticTwoTierOnly
- Added section 2.6: Graceful Degradation
  - User feedback when quality index not ready

bd-3qov (E2E Tests):
- Added MRL re-normalization verification tests:
  - test_mrl_renormalization_correctness
  - test_mrl_index_uses_renormalized_embeddings
  - test_mrl_query_and_doc_same_normalization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
